recommendations.title: Secretly, Greatly
recommendations.overview: Three elite North Korean sleeper agents live under cover for so long that they believe their cover stories are their real identities. They are shocked when they are ordered to kill one another or face death at the hands of an elite hit team.

recommendations.title: The Flu
recommendations.overview: A case of the flu quickly morphs into a pandemic. As the death toll mounts and the living panic, the government plans extreme measures to contain it.

recommendations.title: Joint Security Area
recommendations.overview: Two North Korean soldiers are killed in the border area between North and South Korea, prompting an investigation by a neutral body. The sergeant is the shooter, but the lead investigator, a Swiss-Korean woman, receives differing accounts from the tw

recommendations.title: Bring the Soul: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A glimpse into K-pop group BTS’ world away from the stage, featuring intimate group discussions alongside spectacular concert performances from their world tour.

recommendations.title: Your Name Engraved Herein
recommendations.overview: In 1987, as martial law ends in Taiwan, Jia-han and Birdy fall in love amid family pressure, homophobia and social stigma.

recommendations.title: Break the Silence: The Movie
recommendations.overview: K-pop sensation BTS embark on their 2019 'Love Yourself: Speak Yourself' Tour, as the seven members begin to candidly tell personal stories they have never voiced before.

recommendations.title: Asura: The City of Madness
recommendations.overview: A shady cop finds himself in over his head when he gets caught between Internal Affairs and the city’s corrupt mayor.

recommendations.title: The Dude in Me
recommendations.overview: Dong-hyun is a high school student. One day, he falls from the rooftop and bumps into Pan-soo who is a passerby. Pan-soo is a member of a criminal organization. When the two men wake up in the hospital, they discover that they have switched bodies.

recommendations.title: The Beauty Inside
recommendations.overview: Woo-jin, a furniture designer who wakes up in a different body every day, falls for Yi-soo, a woman he meets through his work.

recommendations.title: Ode to My Father
recommendations.overview: Duk-soo lost his father and younger sister while taking refuge during the Korean War. He leaves for Germany to work as a miner and enters the Vietnam War. He wishes to find his sister.
